name: guess-the-verb
description: Explore your grandmother's old house and find the family heirloom she left behind.

scripts.build:walkthrough: tsc && node ../../transcript-runner.js . -o browser/walkthrough.json --verbose && node -e "const fs=require('fs'),w='dist/web';fs.mkdirSync(w,{recursive:true});fs.copyFileSync('browser/walkthrough.json',w+'/walkthrough.json');fs.copyFileSync('browser/walkthrough.html',w+'/walkthrough.html');console.log('Walkthrough viewer updated')"

author: John Googol
